summary: CP for NVDA below $100 question is at 0.12, threshold is strictly > 0.12. Strong downward trend. NVIDIA earnings Feb 25 but resolution at 3:50 AM ET Feb 26.
content:
Key findings for post 42173:
- CP currently 0.12 (AT the threshold, needs to be STRICTLY above)
- CP was 0.25 in Dec, 0.20 in Jan, 0.15 in late Jan-Feb 12, dropped to 0.12-0.13 Feb 14+
- CP has been stable at 0.12 for 18+ consecutive readings (last ~2 days)
- CP oscillated between 0.12 and 0.13 during Feb 14-15, showing the boundary is porous
- 762 forecasters = very stable base
- NVDA at $180, needs to drop to $100 (44% decline) - very unlikely
- NVIDIA Q4 earnings Feb 25 after close; resolution check Feb 26 at 3:50 AM ET
- Early morning resolution limits post-earnings CP updates
- Overall trend strongly favors continued decline or stability
